entry.title: гҖҗSurgeon Simulator 2гҖ‘Dr. Coyo's Clinic is Closing Down...гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗSurgeon Simulator 2гҖ‘Dr. Coyo's Clinic is Closing Down...гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#envtuber #vtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

media:group.media:title: гҖҗDevil May Cry 5гҖ‘Final Boss. 0 Revives.гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Our Last Tekken Tuesday. Thank you CoyodachiгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Our Last Tekken Tuesday. Thank you CoyodachiгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

media:group.media:title: гҖҗйӣ‘и«Ү/Free TalkгҖ‘Drawing with CoyodachiгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

entry.title: гҖҗPICO PARK 2гҖ‘Super Team! Tekken Team vs PICO PARK 2!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗPICO PARK 2гҖ‘Super Team! Tekken Team vs PICO PARK 2!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
Collab with Youjin Boy Team from Kopanga League Assemble! Pico Park 2! Team work, let's go!
з”ЁеҝғBО©Y @Youjinboy https://x.com/youjin_boy йң§ж–—(kirito) @йң§ж–—ж јгӮІгғјгҒҠгҒҳгҒ•гӮ“ https://x.com/404error17 гӮҚгҒЈгҒҪгӮ“гҒҫгҒӨ @6pon-matsu https://x.com/6pon_matsu
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entry.title: гҖҗDevil May Cry 5гҖ‘Continuing after 3 YEARS??? Been Hibernating on DMC5 Part 5гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗDevil May Cry 5гҖ‘Continuing after 3 YEARS??? Been Hibernating on DMC5 Part 5гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entry.title: гҖҗTekken 8гҖ‘JKT48V vs Kemono Friends V Project BattleгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTekken 8гҖ‘JKT48V vs Kemono Friends V Project BattleгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
Pia Meraleo @PiaMeraleo-JKT48V https://x.com/pia_jkt48v
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entry.title: гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гҒ®гҒ“гҒ©гҒҶ dance collab with Mint! рҹҗҫ #гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮәгҖҖ#гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮәvгҒ·гӮҚгҒҳгҒҮгҒҸгҒЁ

media:group.media:title: гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гҒ®гҒ“гҒ©гҒҶ dance collab with Mint! рҹҗҫ #гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮәгҖҖ#гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮәvгҒ·гӮҚгҒҳгҒҮгҒҸгҒЁ

entry.title: гҖҗMinecraftгҖ‘Finishing Up Coyo Builds in KemoV Server!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗMinecraftгҖ‘Finishing Up Coyo Builds in KemoV Server!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#envtuber #vtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Second to Last Tekken Tuesday Open SessionsгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Second to Last Tekken Tuesday Open SessionsгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Ranked Matches from Mighty RulerгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Season 2 Mighty Ruler Let's Go
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

entry.title: гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гҒ®гҒ“гҒ©гҒҶ Dance Collab with JKT48VвҖҷs Tana! рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҗҫ #jkt48v #гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮә

media:group.media:title: гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гҒ®гҒ“гҒ©гҒҶ Dance Collab with JKT48VвҖҷs Tana! рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҗҫ #jkt48v #гҒ‘гӮӮгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғігӮә
гҖҗCoyo DayгҖ‘5/4 Coyo Day 2025 Party!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
We will look at Coyodachi's coyo illustrations and tekken photos! For those who want to submit their coyo illustration, please use the hashtag on X #coyodayart For those who want to submit their tekken 8 photo, please use the hashtag on X #coyodaytekken Deadline is 30min before the scheduled stream. (5/4 22:45 JST deadline)
Please check the rules below for the tekken photos segment:
RULES вҖў Up to 1 image per person/entry вҖў Do not make cosplays of real people/celebrities/vtubers outside of Kemov вҖў Do not make any inappropriate or controversial customizations вҖў Do not take inappropriate pictures or any images portraying explicit meanings вҖў Must use Tekken 8вҖҷs Photo Mode
Confirmed categories are: 1) Most Creative 2) Most Beautiful 3) Funniest 4) Coolest 5) Cutest
After viewing all submissions, Coyo and Coyodachi will decide the winners that suits best for each category.
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
